ec2.spotfleet.networkbandwidthgbpsreques:
The minimum and maximum amount of network bandwidth, in gigabits per second (Gbps).

**Note**  
Setting the minimum bandwidth does not guarantee that your instance will achieve the minimum bandwidth. Amazon EC2 will identify instance types that support the specified minimum bandwidth, but the actual bandwidth of your instance might go below the specified minimum at times. For more information, see [Available instance bandwidth](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/ec2-instance-network-bandwidth.html

ec2.spotfleet.networkbandwidthgbpsreques.Description: The maximum amount of network bandwidth, in Gbps. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.
The minimum amount of network bandwidth, in Gbps. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
